examples: The station I was bound for was the terminus of the line.
In his deepest depression he felt he'd arrived at a terminus.
"It was a terminus for the gold caravans crossing the Sahara," he said.
At Spa Terminus, butchers, bakers and cheesemakers are among the local food producers with Saturday open houses.
Passengers on one cancelled Ryanair flight were told their baggage would be left outside the terminus.
